problem: What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk?
hypothesis: If Self-assembled monolayer for surface functionalization is applied to without, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 31 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
